responsive_behavior: Sidebar collapses to icons at md then overlay at sm
accessibility_notes: Sidebar navigation as nav landmark; main content as main landmark; skip-to-content link

structure: header + left sidebar + main + right sidebar + footer
responsive_behavior: Sidebars stack below main at md then hide at sm

accessibility_notes: Each section uses appropriate landmark roles; reading order matches visual order

structure: full-width hero + alternating content sections + CTA + footer
responsive_behavior: Hero image scales; sections stack vertically at sm
accessibility_notes: Hero image needs alt text; CTA buttons prominent and descriptive; heading hierarchy

structure: header + narrow content column + optional sidebar
responsive_behavior: Sidebar moves below content at md
accessibility_notes: Article tag for content; proper heading hierarchy h1-h3; readable line length 60-75 chars

structure: header + filters sidebar + product grid + pagination
responsive_behavior: Filter becomes top sheet at md; grid 2-col at sm 1-col at xs
accessibility_notes: Filter announces applied count; product cards have descriptive alt; pagination keyboard accessible

responsive_behavior: Stacks vertically at md; primary content first
accessibility_notes: Content order logical when stacked; both halves independently scrollable if needed

responsive_behavior: Column count reduces: 4 at xl 3 at lg 2 at md 1 at sm
accessibility_notes: Images need alt text; lazy loading for performance; announce new items loaded

structure: fixed left nav + scrollable main area
responsive_behavior: Sidebar becomes bottom tab bar at sm
accessibility_notes: Sidebar nav landmark with aria-label; scroll position preserved on navigation

responsive_behavior: Horizontal scroll with snap; single column view at sm
accessibility_notes: Columns as lists with headings; drag-drop has keyboard alternative; announce card moves

structure: header + step indicator + form content + actions
responsive_behavior: Step indicator becomes compact at sm; full-width inputs
accessibility_notes: Current step announced; progress communicated; back button always available

structure: header + single column feed + floating actions
responsive_behavior: Already mobile-first; wider gutters at lg
use_case: Social feeds news timelines activity logs
accessibility_notes: New content announced to screen readers; focus management on load; back-to-top button

structure: top bar + bottom nav + main content + FAB
responsive_behavior: Bottom nav stays; top bar simplifies at sm; FAB repositions

accessibility_notes: Bottom nav max 5 items; FAB has aria-label; main content scrolls independently
